codeReview.summary: The change is intentionally narrow: only `PUT /api/v1/admin/settings` moves to `ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN`, while tenant-runtime metrics readability and the super-admin runtime-policy mutation path stay intact. Regression coverage includes the original red-path gap, the allowed super-admin global-settings mutation path, tenant-admin denial, and an adjacent export-approval workflow that depends on the global settings toggle, so the tightened authorization does not appear to break the intended operator flow.

summary: PASS. Platform-wide settings mutation is now restricted to super admins, tenant-scoped metrics visibility remains available, and adjacent approval behavior stays covered without a blocking regression.
